content: Steps 1-3 complete (3/13 subissues closed). Foundation built: Tensor (Arc-based identity sharing), TensorStorage, Device, FerrotorchError, shape utilities, creation functions, autograd backward engine with Kahn's sort, no_grad, checkpoint. 41 tests passing. Now dispatching Step 4: elementwise ops (#6) and linalg ops (#7) in parallel.
